title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 70.510 - Expiration of compact, when
text:
70.510.  Expiration of compact, when. — The provisions of sections 70.500 to 70.510 shall expire upon nullification and voidance of the Kansas and Missouri metropolitan culture district compact pursuant to either Article IX or Article X of the compact, enacted in section 70.500.
(L. 1993 H.B. 759 & 772 § 5)
